How to Understand Your Lab Results 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a laboratory test? 
A laboratory (lab) test checks a sample of your blood , urine Â (pee), or other body fluid or tissue to learn about your health. The sample is sent to a lab where health care professionals test it to see if it contains certain substances and, if so, how much.
